summary: Solid Dead performance hampered by heavy distortion and poor recording quality
review: The reviewers note that the band delivered a good show, but the tape suffers from severe distortion caused by overly hot recording levels. The audio is muddy and difficult to listen to, which outweighs the musical strengths in this particular release.

ai_rating.rationale: One low‑star review highlights a poor recording (distortion) but mentions the performance was good; weighting show quality higher yields an overall moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Loads of distortion from hot recording levels, resulting in a muddy and harsh sound.
